backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing job swap platform with user profiles, matching algorithm based on city/company/role preferences, swap request management, messaging between matched users, and role-based access control with admin functions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (authentication, profile management, matches UI, swap requests, messaging, admin dashboard) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing components for authentication, profile forms, match listings, swap requests, messaging UI, admin dashboard, and routing with TanStack Router.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining design tokens for light and dark themes including primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, and sidebar color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the GoNear application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component with TanStack Router setup, Internet Identity authentication flow, profile setup modal trigger for new users, theme provider, and route definitions for all pages.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Access denied screen component displaying shield alert icon and message for non-admin users attempting to access restricted pages with link back to matches.
frontend/src/components/ConversationList: Clickable conversation list item card displaying user profile information with message icon, using useNavigate for type-safe navigation to conversation thread.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with sticky header, navigation (desktop and mobile), and footer. Includes dynamic navigation items based on admin status and highlights the active route.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout with loading states. Clears query cache on logout and handles authentication errors.
frontend/src/components/MatchCard.tsx: Card component displaying user profile match information including name, company, job role, location swap details, salary, and experience level. Includes a button to view full details.
frontend/src/components/MessageBubble.ts: Chat message bubble component that displays messages with different styling for own vs. other user messages. Shows sender name and formatted timestamp.
frontend/src/components/MessageInput.tsx: Message input form component with text field and send button. Handles message submission to a specific recipient with validation and error handling.
frontend/src/components/ProfileForm.tsx: Form component for editing user profile with fields for name, company, job role, cities, salary range, and experience level. Supports initial profile data and displays success/error toasts.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for initial profile setup with the same fields as ProfileForm. Always open and creates a new unverified profile on submission.
frontend/src/components/SendSwapRequestB: Button component for sending swap requests to other users. Checks for existing pending requests and disables the button if one already exists.
Displays a swap request card showing the other user's profile details with accept/reject buttons for incoming pending requests. Uses hooks to fetch user profiles and handle request status updates with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/UserTableRow.tsx: Renders a table row for a user profile in the admin dashboard with verify and block action buttons. Displays user details including name, company, role, location, salary, experience level, and verification status.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on the current identity, initializing access control with an admin token from URL parameters. Invalidates and refetches dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for managing user login/logout state. Creates an AuthClient with configurable options and handles identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend API calls including user profiles, matches, swap requests, messages, and admin functions. Each hook uses the actor from useActor and manages query/mutation state with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors using OKLCH color space. Sets up base styles for the application including font families and smoothing.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component. Creates the QueryClient instance for managing server state.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin-only page that displays a searchable table of all users with their profiles, verification status, and management actions. Shows access denied screen for non-admin users and loading states during data fetching.
frontend/src/pages/ConversationPage.tsx: Displays a one-on-one conversation view with message history and input, fetching messages and user profile by principal parameter. Auto-scrolls to newest messages and shows loading/empty states.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Landing page with Internet Identity login button and feature showcase cards (Find Matches, Send Swap Requests, Direct Messaging, Verified Profiles). Displays branding and platform description for the GoNear job swap service.
frontend/src/pages/MatchDetailPage.tsx: Shows detailed profile information for a matched user including company, job role, experience level, and location. Provides buttons to send swap requests and navigate to messaging.
frontend/src/pages/MatchesPage.tsx: Displays a grid of matched user profiles for job swapping. Shows verification alert if user profile is unverified and empty state when no matches are found.
frontend/src/pages/MessagesPage.tsx: Lists all active conversations with other users. Shows empty state when no conversations exist and loading skeleton during data fetch.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: User profile management page displaying verification status badge and ProfileForm component for editing profile information. Shows loading state during data fetch.
frontend/src/pages/SwapRequestsPage.tsx: Tabbed interface showing incoming and outgoing job swap requests with counts. Filters requests by current user identity and displays empty states for each tab.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and methods to clear parameters from URLs.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom design system with OKLCH color variables, container settings, border radius utilities, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state file documenting GoNear job exchange platform with existing features including user authentication, profile management, matching system, swap requests, messaging, and admin panel, using a blue color scheme with mobile-friendly design.
